raw_prompt: Cinematic wedding reel, slow and emotional, warm tones

intent.raw_prompt: Cinematic wedding reel, slow and emotional, warm tones

image_analyses.description: A newly married Indian couple standing outdoors in a lush, green environment. The groom is wearing a light mint-green sherwani and turban, while the bride is wearing a detailed white and floral lehenga with a pink dupatta. They are looking at each other, reflecting a romantic, joyful mood.
image_analyses.moondream_caption: A beautiful Indian bride and groom standing in an outdoor garden setting, dressed in traditional wedding attire, looking lovingly at one another.

image_analyses.description: A romantic portrait of an Indian bride and groom dressed in traditional wedding attire outdoors.
image_analyses.moondream_caption: A groom wearing a sage green turban and cream-colored sherwani kisses his bride, who is dressed in a heavily embroidered cream and floral lehenga with traditional jewelry, standing in a soft-focus outdoor setting.

image_analyses.description: A romantic portrait of an Indian couple dressed in traditional wedding attire, with the groom kissing the bride's forehead amidst a soft-focus outdoor garden setting.
image_analyses.moondream_caption: A man and a woman in traditional Indian wedding attire stand together in a lush green outdoor setting, the man gently kissing the woman's forehead as she smiles.

image_analyses.description: A close-up, romantic portrait of an Indian couple during their wedding day, with the groom kissing the bride on the forehead while she smiles with eyes closed, wearing traditional ornate attire.
image_analyses.moondream_caption: A tender moment between an Indian bride and groom, with the groom wearing a sage green turban and ivory sherwani, and the bride dressed in a heavily embroidered floral lehenga, both adorned with traditional jewelry.

image_analyses.description: A portrait of an Indian bride and groom dressed in traditional wedding attire, sitting close together and smiling at each other.
image_analyses.moondream_caption: An Indian couple in traditional wedding attire sitting together in an intimate pose, the man wearing a cream-colored sherwani with a matching turban and the woman in an ornate, pastel-toned lehenga with floral patterns and a flower-adorned hairstyle.

storyboard.title: A Union of Hearts

scenes.caption: a promise held in a smile

storyboard.narrative_arc: Beginning: Introduction of the couple in a lush setting; Middle: Deepening intimacy and connection; End: Final tender moment symbolizing their enduring commitment.

storyboard:
Style: corporate_highlights
Pacing: Medium, professional (2–4 seconds per scene). Deliberate and polished.
Color Treatment: Clean, neutral color palette. Slight blue-teal grade.
  Avoid oversaturation. Keep skin tones accurate and professional.
Caption Style: Professional, sentence-case with company branding in mind.
  Example: "Q3 Product Launch" or "Team Excellence Award 2024."
Transition Preference: Clean slides (left-to-right) or subtle fades.
  Consistent transition direction throughout the video.
Animation Style: Slide-in animations for text overlays. Smooth linear easing.
  Lower-third style captions with background bar.
Narrative Arc: Opening brand moment → key milestones → team recognition → CTA.
Music Suggestion: Ambient corporate, light electronic, or soft orchestral.

Style: minimal_clean
Pacing: Slow to medium (3–5 seconds per scene). Intentional breathing room.
Color Treatment: Desaturated, near-monochrome with one accent color.
  High-key lighting, clean whites, and airy aesthetics.
Caption Style: Thin sans-serif font, small size. Lowercase, no punctuation.
  Example: "light and shadow" or "a quiet afternoon."
Transition Preference: Simple fade to white or pure cut. No flashy effects.
  Consistency is more important than variety.
Animation Style: Ultra-subtle opacity fade or slow horizontal drift.
  Avoid any scale or rotation animations.
Narrative Arc: Single mood or concept across all scenes. No strong arc.
Music Suggestion: Ambient drone, lo-fi, or silence with occasional sound design.

Style: cinematic_wedding
Pacing: Slow, lingering shots (4–6 seconds per scene). Allow emotions to breathe.
Color Treatment: Warm, golden-hour tones with slight desaturation on shadows.
  Use LUT-style color grading: lifted blacks, peachy highlights.
Caption Style: Minimal, italic lowercase captions. Emotional, poetic language.
  Example: "forever begins here" or "two families, one love."
Transition Preference: Slow dissolves (fade) and occasional dip-to-white.
  Avoid hard cuts unless emphasizing a vow moment.
Animation Style: Subtle Ken Burns (slow zoom-in or pan) on still images.
  Prefer ease-in-out interpolation. No aggressive motion.
Narrative Arc: Build from quiet arrival → intimate ceremony → joyful celebration.
Music Suggestion: Orchestral strings, piano, or acoustic guitar.
